U

un.caen - package un.caen

un.caen.controller - package un.caen.controller
 
un.caen.model - package un.caen.model
 
un.caen.model.feild - package un.caen.model.feild
 
un.caen.model.items - package un.caen.model.items
 
un.caen.model.player - package un.caen.model.player
 
un.caen.util - package un.caen.util
 
un.caen.view - package un.caen.view
 
update(Player) - Method in class un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy
Updates the properties of the `PlayerProxy` object with the properties of the given `Player` object.
updateData(TableModel) - Method in class un.caen.view.PlayerFrame
Updates the data displayed in the player frame.
updateGridView() - Method in class un.caen.view.GameBoardView
Updates the grid view to reflect the current state of the game.
use(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Bomb
Uses the bomb at a specified position (not implemented).
use(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Bomb
Uses the bomb in a specified direction (not implemented).
use(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Uses the gun at a specified position (not implemented).
use() - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Uses the gun, reducing the ammunition count by one.
use(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Gun
Uses the gun in a specified direction (not implemented).
use(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Mine
Uses the mine at a specified position (not implemented).
use(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Mine
Uses the mine in a specified direction (not implemented).
use(int, int) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Weapon
Uses the weapon at a specified position (to be implemented by subclasses).
use(Direction) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Weapon
Uses the weapon in a specified direction (to be implemented by subclasses).
